Bash(curl -s -m 30 "http://localhost:3001/api/youtube" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
c=d['channel']
s=d['summary']
print\(f\\"Channel: {c['title']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Subscribers: {c['subscribers']}, Views: {c['totalViews']}, Videos: {c['videoCount']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Avg views/video: {s['avgViews']}, Total likes: {s['totalLikes']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"\\\\nTop 5 videos:\\"\)
for v in d['videos'][:5]:
    print\(f\\"  {v['views']:>5} views | {v['likes']:>2} likes | {v['duration']:>5} | {v['title'][:60]}\\"\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/rossm/Desktop/politics-online-marketing && git add src/lib/youtube.ts src/app/api/youtube/route.ts src/app/\\\(dashboard\\\)/youtube/page.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'

Bash(curl -s -m 30 "http://localhost:3001/api/overview" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
yt=d.get\('youtube'\)
br=d.get\('brevo'\)
print\('YouTube:', 'LIVE' if yt else 'MISSING'\)
if yt:
    print\(f'  Subs: {yt[\\"channel\\"][\\"subscribers\\"]}, Views: {yt[\\"channel\\"][\\"totalViews\\"]}, Videos: {yt[\\"channel\\"][\\"videoCount\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  Top: {yt[\\"summary\\"][\\"topVideo\\"][\\"title\\"][:50]} \({yt[\\"summary\\"][\\"topVideo\\"][\\"views\\"]} views\)'\)
print\('Brevo:', 'LIVE' if br else 'MISSING'\)
if br:
    print\(f'  Contacts: {br[\\"totalContacts\\"]}, Open Rate: {br[\\"avgOpenRate\\"]}%, Click Rate: {br[\\"avgClickRate\\"]}%'\)
    print\(f'  Campaigns: {len\(br[\\"campaigns\\"]\)}'\)
print\('TikTok:', d.get\('tiktok'\) or 'mock \(not integrated\)'\)
print\('Instagram:', d.get\('instagram'\) or 'mock \(not integrated\)'\)
" 2>&1)
